title: ClinicPro – Medical Management & Billing System
description: Flask-based medical store and clinic management system with inventory, billing, and reporting.
overview: A single-server medical management application combining inventory control, billing automation, due tracking, and reporting with Windows desktop packaging support.
finalFeatures: Medicine inventory with expiry and low-stock alerts
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: Preventing stock inconsistencies during billing. Solution: Real-time stock deduction and validation rules.
Challenge: Offline-capable deployment. Solution: SQLite-backed architecture with EXE/MSI packaging.
clientFeedback: Billing accuracy improved and manual stock tracking was completely eliminated.

title: e-Kharidari – Full-Stack E-Commerce Marketplace
description: Full-stack marketplace platform with JWT authentication, cart synchronization, and Razorpay payment integration.
overview: A scalable marketplace-style web application built with Django REST Framework and React, enabling user onboarding, product catalog browsing, cart management, secure checkout, and order lifecycle tracking.
finalFeatures: Custom user model with email/mobile login + OTP verification
Product catalog with variants, ratings, reviews, wishlist
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: Secure token-based authentication flow. Solution: SimpleJWT with refresh token rotation and Axios interceptors.
Challenge: Payment verification integrity. Solution: Server-side Razorpay signature verification workflow.
clientFeedback: The platform provided a smooth shopping experience and secure checkout flow for our customers.

title: MediServe Ops Dashboard
description: Operational dashboard delivered for clinic chain management and scheduling.
overview: A role-based operations platform built for multi-clinic appointment control, billing insights, and staff utilization reporting.
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: Fragmented scheduling data across branches. Solution: Centralized scheduling engine and branch-level access controls.
Challenge: Slow reporting cycles. Solution: Precomputed analytics widgets for daily KPI visibility.
clientFeedback: The platform unified our branch operations and gave leadership real-time visibility for the first time.

title: BuilderPro Resource Portal
description: Resource planning and progress tracking portal for construction project teams.
overview: Delivered a project intelligence portal to track manpower, materials, and site milestones from one interface.
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: Inconsistent reporting formats from site teams. Solution: Standardized update templates with validation.
Challenge: Manual weekly rollups. Solution: Auto-generated project health reports.
clientFeedback: CodeWork turned a high-friction process into a streamlined planning workflow for our teams.

title: Ekant Group – MLM & Education Platform
description: Django-based MLM and course distribution platform with automated income engine and wallet workflows.
overview: A binary-structure MLM system integrated with course sales, automated level/matching income distribution, rank rewards, wallet management, and admin financial analytics.
finalFeatures: Binary sponsor tree with left/right placement
Automated level and matching income engine
Member wallet with transfer and withdrawal workflows
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: Complex multi-level income distribution accuracy. Solution: Modular service-layer based income engine with transaction logging.
Challenge: Financial transparency and audit tracking. Solution: Centralized company wallet ledger and structured income history records.
clientFeedback: The platform streamlined our MLM income calculations and significantly improved operational control.

title: Northline Retail Automation Suite
description: Delivered operations automation suite for order handling and inventory alerts.
overview: A workflow automation suite that reduced manual order processing and improved stock visibility across multiple outlets.
challengesAndSolutions: Challenge: High manual dependency in replenishment workflow. Solution: Rule-based automation for stock triggers.
Challenge: Delayed supplier response visibility. Solution: Unified supplier status tracker.
clientFeedback: We saw faster turnaround and fewer stockout incidents within weeks of launch.
